betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Uranium-238§f

§aThe most common uranium isotope — depleted uranium for weapons, armor, and fuel!§f

§bUranium-238§f makes up ~§e91.6%§f of natural NTM uranium. While not directly fissile, it has many practical uses.

§6Production§f:
§b• Gas Centrifuge§f: primary method, byproduct of U-235 enrichment
§b• Reprocessing§f: small amounts from spent thorium fuel and some RBMK waste

§6Uses§f:
§b• Uranium Fuel§f: mixed with U-235 (5:1 U-238:U-235 ratio)
§b• MOX Fuel§f: mixed with plutonium
§b• RTG Pellets§f: §e5§f HE/tick (weaker than Pu-238, but cheaper). With decay: §e720M§f ticks lifespan (~150 in-game years), §e3.6B§f HE total. Decays to lead.
§b• Depleted Uranium Weapons§f: increased damage and penetration
§b• Self-Charging Battery§f: tier 1, §e5§f HE/tick
§b• Titanium Filter§f: for Watz power plant
§b• Custom Nuke§f: §e1.1×§f multiplier to nuclear stage

§b• §eBreeding§f: U-238 breeds into §bReactor Grade Plutonium§f

§eTip§f: U-238 is the workhorse of nuclear fuel. It's produced in large quantities as a byproduct of enrichment — don't throw it away! Store it for MOX fuel and DU ammunition.
